prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace how GCC generates DWARF debug information in gcc. Find C++ source files implementing: the DWARF DIE (Debug Info Entry) creation, the debug info hook interface (called by the front end), the dwarf2out.cc output generation, and the line number table emission.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the compiler-toolchain fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Trace how GCC generates DWARF debug information in gcc. Find C++ source files implementing: the DWARF DIE (Debug Info Entry) creation, the debug info hook interface (called by the front end), the dwarf2out.cc output generation, and the line number table emission.
